description.text: As the sun begins to set and the light begins to fade, which heroes and villains will emerge from the big top at the circus? One Cube and a Base.

es.original: As the sun begins to set and the light begins to fade, which heroes and villains will emerge from the big top at the circus? One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Todo listo para que empiece la función.
Un generador y un núcleo.

ru.original: As the sun begins to set and the light begins to fade, which heroes and villains will emerge from the big top at the circus? One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Солнце начинает заходить, и свет тускнеет. Какие же герои и злодеи появятся из палатки цирка? Один куб и база.

de.original: As the sun begins to set and the light begins to fade, which heroes and villains will emerge from the big top at the circus? One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Welche Helden und Schurken werden siegen, wenn die Sonne über dem Zirkus untergeht? Ein Generator und eine Basis.

fr.original: As the sun begins to set and the light begins to fade, which heroes and villains will emerge from the big top at the circus? One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Le soleil se couche, l'obscurité descend : qui des héros et des méchants va émerger du chapiteau ? Un cube et une base.

pt.original: As the sun begins to set and the light begins to fade, which heroes and villains will emerge from the big top at the circus? One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Quando o sol começar a se pôr e as luzes se desvanecerem, quais heróis e vilões surgirão na grande tenda do circo? Um Cubo e uma Base.
